title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dalmia Bharat - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dalmia Bharat - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Dalmia Bharat are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dalmia Bharat:
Dalmia Bharat is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat!
